message:
fix(why): Use cross-platform path separator regex

Replace hardcoded '/' split with regex /[\\/]/ to handle both
forward slash and backslash path separators. This ensures proper
path display on Windows systems where paths may use backslashes.

Affects:
- Session path shortening in sourceSessions display
- Feedback history session path display

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
